user_story: Como administrador, eu quero ver na página /admin/check-ins apenas os check-ins que ainda podem ser acionados (pendentes e validados), sem poluição de itens já resolvidos.

tests.name: lista check-ins pendentes e valida ao clicar em 'Validar'
exibe EmptyState quando não há check-ins pendentes
exibe erro amigável ao falhar validação (409)
rejeita um check-in pendente ao clicar em 'Rejeitar'
exibe erro amigável ao falhar rejeição
exibe apenas botão rejeitar para check-in validado
oculta check-ins rejeitados mesmo quando retornados pela API
exibe EmptyState quando todos check-ins são rejeitados

test_output_summary: ✓ All tests passed. Frontend test suite: 257 tests passed (257). RF-014 acceptance tests validated that: (1) Rejected check-ins are filtered out from the list even when API returns them, (2) Empty state is shown when all check-ins are rejected, (3) Only pending and validated check-ins are visible.

rf_013.description: Page displays check-ins with status 'pending' and 'validated'
rf_013.implementation: Line 80-82 in page.tsx filters for !rejected items

rf_015.implementation: check-in-actions.tsx lines 142-152: PendingActions component renders ApproveButton + RejectButton

rf_016.implementation: check-in-actions.tsx lines 131-139: RejectButton only for validated status

notes: ✅ All requirements covered. Implementation uses filter pattern to remove rejected items from the list. CheckInActions component correctly handles conditional rendering based on check-in status. Tests include both happy path (validate, reject) and error scenarios (409 conflict, 404 not found). RF-014 acceptance test verifies the critical requirement that rejected items are not visible in the admin panel even when returned by the API.
